query:
SELECT EXISTS(
            SELECT 1 FROM items i
            INNER JOIN feeds f ON i.source_id = f.source_id
            LEFT JOIN feed_subscriptions fs ON f.id = fs.feed_id AND fs.user_id = $1
            WHERE i.id = $2 AND (f.is_public OR f.owner_id = $1 OR fs.user_id = $1)
        ) as "has_access!"
